# Fork patches applied on top of upstream/main, in order.
#
# One git ref per line:
#   - a full 40-char commit SHA (preferred — reproducible), or
#   - "owner:branch" to cherry-pick the tip of a fork branch.
# Blank lines and lines starting with '#' are ignored.
#
# Conflicts never silently drop a patch. The build skips the conflicting patch,
# ships without it, and opens a "fork-conflict" issue; the conflict-resolver
# workflow then rebases the patch onto upstream and updates its SHA here.

# app-shortcuts: launcher shortcuts to connect/disconnect the VPN  (PR tailscale/tailscale-android#810)
76b307f3e2e5703f6b61f80cd13ee2cb4dff8071
